description: Testing authentication flow when sharing content to social media platforms for both logged-in and non-logged-in users.

test_view_points.viewpoint: User logged in Facebook / Twitter / Gmail already
User not log in Facebook / Twitter / Gmail already
expected_result:
+ Open Facebook / Twitter / Gmail login screen
+ After logging in, open share screen as spec

description: Testing various aspects of shared content including thumbnails, titles, and descriptions with different character types and lengths.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check thumbnail when sharing below content
+ Sharing content has no thumbnail (Text only)
+ Sharing content has thumbnail (image, video...)

Check title of post when sharing title with different length
+ < Max length
+ = Max length
+ > Max length
expected_result:
+ Display full max length of title correctly on both Share screen and Destination screen (Facebook/Google+/Twitter)
+ For the text exceed max length, it will show "..." or "see more" string on both Share screen and Destination screen (Facebook/Google+/Twitter)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check title of post when sharing NULL title
expected_result: Not display title on both Share screen and Destination screen (Facebook/Google+/Twitter)"

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check title of post when sharing below type of character
+ Datetime
+ Alphanumeric and English characters 
+ Japanese character (Full-width/ Halfwidth)
+ Special character
+ Emoji
+ Icons
expected_result: Display full value of title correctly, not broken font and layout

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check description of post when sharing description with different length
+ < Max length
+ = Max length
+ > Max length
expected_result:
+ Display full max length of description correctly on both Share screen and Destination screen (Facebook/Google+/Twitter)
+ For the text exceed max length, it will show "..." or "see more" string on both Share screen and Destination screen (Facebook/Google+/Twitter)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check description of post when sharing NULL description
expected_result: Not display description on both Share screen and Destination screen (Facebook/Google+/Twitter)"

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check description of post when sharing below type of character
+ Datetime
+ Alphanumeric and English characters: Has space between characters
+ Alphanumeric and English characters: Has no space between characters
+ Japanese character (Full-width/ Halfwidth)
+ Special character
+ Emoji
+ Icons
+ Image: jpg, jpeg, tiff, gif
+ Video
+ URL
+ Content in one paragraph
+ Content in multi lines/multi paragraph
expected_result: Display full value of description correctly, not broken font and layout

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check description of post when edit source code 
+ Check content of shared post after Edit source content
+ Check content of shared post after Delete source content
expected_result:
Display correctly base on spec
Ex: Update shared content corresponding source content.

description: Testing post visibility settings and share count functionality after successful sharing.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check who can view shared post when
+ When set Only me
+ When set Specified friends
+ When set All
expected_result:
+ Post is shared with correct person
+ Other persons can not view post

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check count number of share
+ When share a post successfully
+ When share a post unsuccessfully
+ When cancel a sharing
expected_result:
Display correct count number of share
+ If share successfully, count number = Previous share count number +1
+ If share unsuccessfully, count number = Previous share count number (not changed)
